'''Resjin Resjic''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Crucible (Imperial-class)|''Crucible'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was a close confidant of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dorin Millavec]].
